name: The Blister
description: The Blister is a Rare Torgue shotgun from the base game with a predefined corrosive build. It is essentially a standard corrosive shotgun with slightly higher damage but otherwise average performance despite its Torgue label.

special.description: Predefined corrosive build with extra damage; it improves accuracy/spread and recoil control but reduces fire rate and damage compared to typical rolls.
special.title: It's a painful thing
